additional_steps.description: 分析 MTK 平台特有的系统事件
additional_steps.name: MTK 平台事件
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as mtk_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms,
  (s.ts - (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})) / 1e6 as relative_ts_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*MTK*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*MTKFB*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*MediaTek*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*PerfService*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.ts ASC

additional_steps.name: MTK 性能服务
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as perf_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*PerfService*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*PowerHal*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*fps_policy*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.dur DESC

additional_steps.name: MTK GPU 分析
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as gpu_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*Mali*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*PowerVR*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*IMG*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.dur DESC
LIMIT 20

meta.description: 针对联发科平台优化的启动分析
